name: Anti-Bully Squad (PvZ2 Reflourished)
description:
The Anti-Bully Squad are recurring antagonists from Plants vs. Zombies 2: Reflourished, originally inspired by the PvZ comic Bully for You.

Consisting of Stilts, Greg-Gantuar, and Mr. Grim-Brim, this dysfunctional trio of former college students hold a long-standing grudge against Dr. Zomboss after being bullied by him during their university years. Though petty, chaotic, and often hilariously incompetent, they remain committed to their endless revenge schemes and misguided attempts to outsmart Zomboss.
creator: real_nightshade
